sprintAction: Name chair, alternate, scope, and decision authority.
evidenceDue: Private authority roster and minute placeholder.
closeoutCriteria: Chair and alternate recorded with quorum authority.
stopTrigger: No named chair or unclear authority route.
publicLine: Authority remains private and unresolved; no pilot has been approved.

sprintAction: Approve consent, notice, withdrawal, storage, and contact copy.
stopTrigger: Copy implies real intake or unclear withdrawal.
publicLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private owner review.

sprintAction: Confirm outbound email stays disabled or fake/sample-contained.
closeoutCriteria: No real outbound email can send from the demo.
stopTrigger: Any real email sends or live invite is implied.
publicLine: No outbound email is active for real participants.

sprintAction: Accept export, delete, retention, and custody drill proof.
closeoutCriteria: Export, delete, retention, and custody pass privately.
stopTrigger: Delete proof absent or retention unclear.
publicLine: Data export, deletion, and retention controls remain under private review.

sprintAction: Accept complaint, pause, escalation, and closeout route.
closeoutCriteria: Support owner confirms pause and escalation route.
stopTrigger: Complaint path has no owner or no pause route.
publicLine: Support routes are not live services.

sprintAction: Confirm official Toastmasters systems stay out of scope.
closeoutCriteria: No official member, payment, education, officer, or club workflow is active.
publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains a fake/sample guest and boundary tester only.

sprintAction: Accept custody index and redaction rules.
closeoutCriteria: Public package shows only aggregate status and custody placeholders.
publicLine: Private evidence is not published in the public package.

sprintAction: Close provider real-record refusal and fake/sample-only boundary pack.
evidenceDue: Provider refusal proof and RFQ boundary approval.
closeoutCriteria: Provider real-record asks are rejected and redirected to fake/sample schemas only.
stopTrigger: Provider receives or is promised real records, official records, outbound email, credentials, logs, or live access.
publicLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

closeoutCriteria: Guest support wording cannot read as official member service.
stopTrigger: Copy implies member service, officer, payment, education, or official record.
publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters sample records do not represent official member services.

sprintAction: Attach backup restore, revoke, and credential proof references.
closeoutCriteria: Security reviewer accepts fake/sample environment proof.
stopTrigger: Credential, log, restore, or revoke proof missing.
publicLine: No live Decidim access is approved by this public demo.

sprintAction: Accept admin expiry, revoke route, and access owner path.
closeoutCriteria: Admin access has expiry, revoke route, and owner approval.
stopTrigger: Unrestricted or unowned admin access appears.
publicLine: No live admin access is approved by this public demo.

closeoutCriteria: RFQ excludes real records, official Toastmasters data, outbound email, credentials, and live access.
stopTrigger: Provider scope implies live or real-record access.
publicLine: Provider or self-build options remain under fake/sample-only review.

sprintAction: Complete owner alternate rota and attendance roster.
closeoutCriteria: Every required owner has an alternate and attendance state.
stopTrigger: No quorum or missing owner alternate.
publicLine: Named owners must approve their own gates privately.

closeoutCriteria: No real business-sensitive or contact fields appear.
publicLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test path.

closeoutCriteria: Public line says preparation only and does not imply launch.
stopTrigger: Public wording implies approval, launch, or private evidence pass.
publicLine: The public demo remains a fake/sample preparation tool; no live pilot has been approved.

sprintAction: Add v5.5 sprint pack to reviewer materials.
closeoutCriteria: Reviewers can follow agenda, evidence, closeout, and decision paths.
stopTrigger: Reviewer pack lacks closeout sprint steps.
publicLine: The demo now includes an owner closeout sprint layer.

sprintAction: Prepare final decision minute shell and outcome options.
closeoutCriteria: Proceed, repeat, and no-go/archive options are explicit.
stopTrigger: Decision minute implies proceed before closeout.
publicLine: The next valid step is closeout sprint, repeat testing, or no-go/archive.

sprintAction: Schedule repeat P0 lab only after owner closeout is accepted.
evidenceDue: Private calendar hold and stop trigger register.
closeoutCriteria: Calendar, quorum, evidence folder, and stop triggers are confirmed.
stopTrigger: Repeat run starts before P0 closeout readiness.
publicLine: Preparation continues; no pilot has been approved.
